csv_report.title: Membership activity
csv_report.sql:
SELECT
  c.email,
  c.signed_up_at,
  m.plan_name,
  m.plan_price_dollars,
  m.class_limit,
  m.state AS membership_state,
  m.purchased_at,
  m.activated_at,
  m.cancelled_at,
  m.next_renewal_at,
  c.bookings_count,
  c.completed_count,
  c.lifetime_value_dollars
FROM vw_customers c
LEFT JOIN vw_memberships m ON m.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE
  m.plan_name IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(m.plan_name) != ''
  AND (m.purchased_at IS NULL OR (
    strftime('%Y-%m-%d', m.purchased_at) >= '2020-01-01'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', m.purchased_at) <= '2026-05-21'
  ))
ORDER BY
  c.email ASC,
  m.purchased_at DESC
